title: Lappeenranta, South Karelia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lappeenranta, South Karelia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lappeenranta is a city in South Karelia with a population of 73,000. A border city near Russia on Lake Saimaa, known for its fortress, sand beaches, and sauna culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
